query:
SELECT wdf.worker_id, w.name_ar, w.group_id, g.name_ar as group_name, wdf.work_date 
FROM worker_daily_finance wdf
JOIN workers w ON wdf.worker_id = w.id
JOIN groups g ON w.group_id = g.id
WHERE wdf.work_date = '2026-02-06';
